artefacts.data_model_amendment: v5.2 (2026-06-08): added BusinessCalendar entity (§5.2.46) — Stage-3/ADR-6 follow-up, folded into initial schema pre-deployment, re-validated; Gate B remains satisfied (47 tables).

Re-validated (schema LOAD_EXIT=0 + YAML 65 paths). Foundation LLDs FR-052/010/130/140/071/081 corrected.

lld.verification: All 98 files present; contract-correctness sweep clean (no 422/UNAUTHORISED/EXTERNAL_SERVICE_ERROR/requireAuth/src-app-api/ORM).
